fulltext: NLGuidance shall always satisfy Vv * yout > 0
NLGuidance shall always satisfy mag(yout - Xtarg) >= r & dot((yout - Xtarg),(yout - Xv)) = 0
if mag(Xr) < r & mag(r1) < mag(r2) NLGuidance shall always satisfy yout = Xap1
if mag(Xr) < r & mag(r1) >= mag(r2) NLGuidance shall always satisfy yout = Xap2
NLGuidance shall always satisfy mag(yout - pre_yout) <= T_param * mag(Vt + Vv)
NLGuidance shall always satisfy yout * Xr > 0
NLGuidance shall always satisfy yout(3) - Xtarg(3) = 0
